source_notes: Bluemira is a modular reactor design framework (CAD + systems interfaces). Clause semantics below reflect typical plasma/reactor design workflows where plasma limits are designer-enforced hard gates and plant closures are required for power-plant studies. Exact enforcement depends on the configured design problem — treat as documentation semantics, not a numeric PROCESS parity claim.

authority_behavior.notes: Plasma equilibrium / 0-D modules typically gate q95, Greenwald fraction, and beta_N as design hard limits. Net electric and TBR are required for DEMO-class plant studies when plant modules are enabled. Detachment and component lifetime are usually screening/diagnostic until coupled to dedicated divertor/structural tools. Availability is generally outside the core Bluemira physics loop.
